assets.name: 金河粮磨区
assets.qc_notes: Steam grainmill, river machinery, grain sacks, cellar hatch, and ground-away artillery interfaces are visible; use deterministic emblem references for exact faction marks.
assets.downstream_usage: Episode 04 grainmill infiltration, disarmament-order exposition, sealed weapon cellar reference, and steam chase blocking.

assets.name: 灰烬书院
assets.qc_notes: Burned arcade, black shelf corridors, cracked star-chart disk, scorched page fragments, and wax-seal details are readable without clean intact-library drift.
assets.downstream_usage: Episode 05 burned archive exploration, forbidden song clues, identifier child staging, and star-chart clue frames.

assets.name: 墙下集市
assets.qc_notes: Wall shadow, gray awnings, kiln-cave doors, food tokens, black-market passes, and blocked narrow exits support stateless wallfoot staging.
assets.downstream_usage: Episode 07 wallfoot arrival, food-token bargaining, Lu Qingli betrayal/rescue blocking, and new-homeland theme staging.

assets.name: 鸣骨岭
assets.qc_notes: Sparse snow ridge, wind-carved bone holes, snow pit shelter, ice-blue fire, half-buried weapons, and distant herd silhouettes keep the location intimate rather than battlefield-scale.
assets.downstream_usage: Episode 09 ridge crossing, Lu Mi rescue encounter, bone-flute sound motif, and enemy-as-disaster theme frames.

assets.name: 寒鸦堡
assets.qc_notes: Black-stone fortress exterior, membrane corridor, interrogation hall, wax archive wall, and occupied-human-architecture identity are readable; exact Sumin mark should use style v03/v04 references when critical.
assets.downstream_usage: Episode 10 Hanya Fort infiltration, Shen Jiheng archive reveal, Li Tang threat staging, and Bai Yi confrontation frames.

assets.name: 坍塌烽燧
assets.qc_notes: Broken tower interior, snow escape slope, ember cracks, pursuer silhouettes, damaged treaty fragment, and flag cloth in snow-mud preserve the incomplete finale tone.
assets.downstream_usage: Episode 12 relay escape exit, snow confrontation, broken-flag value choice, and season-one final action reference.

qc_summary.image_dimensions: pass: all generated boards are 936x1664 PNG files
continuity_risk: AI-generated faction marks are acceptable for mood boards but should defer to deterministic style v03/v04 references when exact emblem geometry matters.
Jinhe Grainmill uses strong steam-industrial silhouettes; avoid interpreting it as modern heavy industry in downstream shot prompts.
Hanya Fort uses membrane and white-wing motifs clearly; keep it framed as occupied human fortress rather than pure hive cave.
